title: 2주차 총정리 (수식어 통합)
instruction: 다음 문장에서 수식어를 괄호로 묶고, 뼈대의 형식을 밝힌 후 전체 문장을 해석해 보세요.

problems.stem: In winter, many birds fly south for warmth.
The small puppy in the box looked very weak.

answer.analysis: The small puppy(S) (in the box) looked(V) (very) weak(C).

problems.stem: I usually read a few pages of a book before bed.

answer.analysis: I(S) (usually) read(V) a few pages(O) (of a book) (before bed).
answer.translation: 나는 (보통) (잠자리에 들기 전에) (책) 몇 페이지를 읽는다.

problems.stem: The tour guide showed us many historical sites in the city.

answer.analysis: The tour guide(S) showed(V) us(IO) many historical sites(DO) (in the city).
answer.translation: 그 여행 가이드는 우리에게 (그 도시의) 많은 유적지를 보여주었다.

problems.stem: The coach's passionate speech made the players more confident.

answer.analysis: The coach's passionate speech(S) made(V) the players(O) (more) confident(OC).
answer.translation: 감독의 열정적인 연설은 선수들을 (더) 자신감 있게 만들었다.

problems.stem: The old tree in our backyard has stood there for over a century.

answer.analysis: The old tree(S) (in our backyard) has stood(V) (there) (for over a century).
answer.translation: (우리 뒷마당의) 그 오래된 나무는 (그곳에) (1세기가 넘도록) 서 있었다.

problems.stem: The soup in this restaurant always tastes good on a cold day.

answer.analysis: The soup(S) (in this restaurant) (always) tastes(V) good(C) (on a cold day).

problems.stem: I completely forgot about the meeting this morning.

answer.translation: 나는 (오늘 아침에) (그 회의에 대해) (완전히) 잊고 있었다.

problems.stem: My boss sent me an urgent email with an attachment.

answer.analysis: My boss(S) sent(V) me(IO) an urgent email(DO) (with an attachment).
answer.translation: 나의 상사는 나에게 (첨부 파일이 있는) 긴급 이메일을 보냈다.

problems.stem: The unexpected result of the experiment made the scientists very happy.

answer.analysis: The unexpected result(S) (of the experiment) made(V) the scientists(O) (very) happy(OC).
answer.translation: (그 실험의) 예상치 못한 결과는 과학자들을 (매우) 행복하게 만들었다.
